4741.description: Legendary rock band Green Day perform an explosive set in front of 10000 thrilled fans in Seville exclusively for MTV World Stage including the tracks Good Riddance, Father of All and American Idiot.

4751.title: My Life On MTV
4751.description: No one saw the late 90's pop explosion coming but once these two future legends stepped on the TRL stage they quickly became family, and gave us some of the best pop moments in MTV history. (S1, ep9)

4752.title: DNCE Isle Of MTV 2017: World Stage
4752.description: DNCE rock Malta at the Isle Of MTV 2017 with a stunning set performed in front of tens of thousands of ecstatic fans!

11143.title: MTV Unplugged Natalia Przybysz
11143.description: Recorded in Warsaw in 2020, Polish R&B singer Natalia Przybysz is the latest artist to perform some of her best-loved tracks, exclusively for MTV Unplugged!
